description: The 'Ndrina Fiarè is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Gregorio d'Ippona, Vibo Valentia, Italy. It was judicially recognized only in 2013. The clan is allied with the Mancuso family and has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, usury, money laundering, and illegal immigration. Its leader Saverio Razionale moved to Rome in 2005, expanding the clan's criminal network there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il traffico partiva della Colombia per giungere poi nei porti di Genova , Gioia Tauro e Napoli , attraverso la Spagna ed i Paesi Bassi
country_links.context: The organization sources cocaine from Colombia as part of its international drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Quest'ultimo dal 2005 si trasferisce a Roma dove replica la sua rete criminale del suo paese d'origine.
country_links.context: The organization operates in Italy, including Rome and various regions, with drug trafficking, extortion, and infiltration of local government.

country_links.evidence_quote: attraverso la Spagna ed i Paesi Bassi
country_links.context: The organization routes cocaine through the Netherlands as part of its trafficking route.

country_links.evidence_quote: attraverso la Spagna ed i Paesi Bassi
country_links.context: The organization routes cocaine through Spain as part of its trafficking route.

country_links.evidence_quote: veniva a anche redistribuita nel Regno Unito
country_links.context: The organization redistributes cocaine in the United Kingdom.
